name: Woodlands Wheelchair Shuttle
districts_or_customers: serving The Woodlands, Conroe, Montgomery, Magnolia, Spring, Tomball TX
recent_news: Long-running micro NEMT operator; founded 2000 by a mother seeking safe affordable private-pay wheelchair transport. No M&A or growth signals.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus/SPED contractor — pure private-pay NEMT/wheelchair van service. Too small (2 employees, <5 vans) and out-of-segment for a Summit tuck-in. Pass.

name: A C H Transportation LLC
fleet_size_est: unknown (general logistics carrier, not school buses)
recent_news: Operates as a general logistics/cargo carrier and federal government contractor; no school-district or SPED contracts identified. Listed in some directories as 'special needs transportation' but company website describes general freight/logistics.
fit_notes: Mis-tagged as student/special-needs operator — actual website positions as general freight & supplies logistics with federal contracts. Not a school-bus/SPED tuck-in for Summit. Pass.

name: ALC Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Not publicly disclosed; no confirmed school-district contracts (do NOT confuse with national 'ALC Schools' which rebranded to EverDriven — separate company)
recent_news: Active Florida LLC at 204 Daventry Dr, Debary; veteran-owned; ~$459K revenue per D&B/Buzzfile. No M&A or material news. Website 'girgeslaw.com' in source data appears unrelated (likely registered-agent law firm).
website: unconfirmed (no operating website found; source-data URL girgeslaw.com is unrelated)
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator (~3-6 employees, sub-$500K revenue) in Debary FL. Veteran-owned; no confirmed district contracts. Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in unless rolled in as a micro-bolt-on; monitor as a low-priority FL contact.

name: Big River Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Fund IV) — acquired Minnesota Coaches Inc. (parent operating co. for Hastings Bus Company, Big River Bus Company, Big River Tours) in 2024/2025 via Patrick O. Regan / TIP Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC
principals: Mike Karlen (General Mgr per source data)
fleet_size_est: ~90+ drivers/aides combined with Hastings Bus Co; ~50-80 buses estimated for Big River segment
service_types: special-education transport for South Washington County area
recent_news: 2024 STB filing (Federal Register, Nov 2024) and Jan 2025 control-acquisition filing: Tiger Infrastructure Partners Fund IV / TIP MN Investments LP / TIP Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC took control of Minnesota Coaches Inc. and affiliates including Faribault Transportation, Marschall Line, Rehbein Transit, Ready Bus, Voyageur Bus, Minn-Dakota Coaches — Big River Bus Co. operates as a DBA of Minnesota Coaches.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in candidate — owned by Tiger Infrastructure Partners as part of the Minnesota Coaches platform (a direct competitor PE-backed roll-up). Track as competitive intel only.

name: Mayra School Transportation
service_types: possibly contracted route driver for Miami-Dade County Public Schools
districts_or_customers: Possible Miami-Dade County Public Schools (data file lists dadeschools.net — district site, not company URL)
recent_news: No news, web presence, or independent corporate filings located. Likely an owner-operator with a single bus/van route. Website in source data (dadeschools.net) is the district, not the company.
fit_notes: Micro owner-operator (2 employees, ~$89K revenue, no website). Too small to be a Summit tuck-in; not actionable. Pass.
